problem_id: AI-Based Tender Evaluation and Eligibility Analysis for Government Procurement
summary: Design a technical platform that evaluates tenders, understands bidders, checks eligibility, and produces explainable evaluation reports. The system uses OCR, NLP, rule-based validation, semantic AI matching, and an explanation and audit layer.
key_steps: Extracting Eligibility Criteria from Tender Documents
optimization_claims: Fair, fast, and transparent evaluation process with accountability.
Reduced errors due to explainability and human-in-the-loop.
constraints_addressed: Difficulties in auditing scanned or unstructured documents
